'''âh-zh-j''' ('''kahazhaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unabandon|unabandon]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-zh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unabandon|unabandon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-zh-j
|-
! Lemma
| kahazhaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihazhaj|thihazhaj]] || [[word:jihazhaj|jihazhaj]] || [[word:shihazhaj|shihazhaj]] || [[word:kihazhaj|kihazhaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhazhaj|thuthuhazhaj]] || [[word:jujuhazhaj|jujuhazhaj]] || [[word:shushuhazhaj|shushuhazhaj]] || [[word:kukuhazhaj|kukuhazhaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhazhaj|thuhazhaj]] || [[word:juhazhaj|juhazhaj]] || [[word:shuhazhaj|shuhazhaj]] || [[word:kuhazhaj|kuhazhaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhazhaj|thuhazhaj]] || [[word:juhazhaj|juhazhaj]] || [[word:shuhazhaj|shuhazhaj]] || [[word:kuhazhaj|kuhazhaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehazhaj|thehazhaj]] || [[word:jehazhaj|jehazhaj]] || [[word:shehazhaj|shehazhaj]] || [[word:kehazhaj|kehazhaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohazhaj|thothohazhaj]] || [[word:jojohazhaj|jojohazhaj]] || [[word:shoshohazhaj|shoshohazhaj]] || [[word:kokohazhaj|kokohazhaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohazhaj|thohazhaj]] || [[word:johazhaj|johazhaj]] || [[word:shohazhaj|shohazhaj]] || [[word:kohazhaj|kohazhaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohazhaj|thohazhaj]] || [[word:johazhaj|johazhaj]] || [[word:shohazhaj|shohazhaj]] || [[word:kohazhaj|kohazhaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠhazhaj|thĂŠhazhaj]] || [[word:jĂŠhazhaj|jĂŠhazhaj]] || [[word:shĂŠhazhaj|shĂŠhazhaj]] || [[word:kĂŠhazhaj|kĂŠhazhaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahazhaj|thathahazhaj]] || [[word:jajahazhaj|jajahazhaj]] || [[word:shashahazhaj|shashahazhaj]] || [[word:kakahazhaj|kakahazhaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahazhaj|thahazhaj]] || [[word:jahazhaj|jahazhaj]] || [[word:shahazhaj|shahazhaj]] || [[word:kahazhaj|kahazhaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahazhaj|thahazhaj]] || [[word:jahazhaj|jahazhaj]] || [[word:shahazhaj|shahazhaj]] || [[word:kahazhaj|kahazhaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahazhaj|shahazhaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahazhaj|goshahazhaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahazhaj|gokishahazhaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahazhajnĂŒ|shahazhajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahazhajnknĂŒ|goshahazhajnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahazhajnĂŒ|gokishahazhajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahazhajshĂ«|shahazhajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahazhajnkshĂ«|goshahazhajnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahazhajshĂ«|gokishahazhajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahazhajro|shahazhajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahazhajnkro|goshahazhajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahazhajro|gokishahazhajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahazhajmu|shahazhajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahazhajnkmu|goshahazhajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahazhajmu|gokishahazhajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahazhajsher|shahazhajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahazhajnksher|goshahazhajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahazhajsher|gokishahazhajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahazhajng|shahazhajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahazhajnkng|goshahazhajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahazhajng|gokishahazhajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahazhajya|shahazhajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahazhajnkya|goshahazhajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahazhajya|gokishahazhajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahazhajyam|shahazhajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahazhajnkyam|goshahazhajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahazhajyam|gokishahazhajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahazhajnĂŒshĂ«|shahazhajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahazhajnknĂŒshĂ«|goshahazhajnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahazhajnĂŒshĂ«|gokishahazhajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahazhajnĂŒro|shahazhajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahazhajnknĂŒro|goshahazhajnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahazhajnĂŒro|gokishahazhajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahazhajnĂŒmu|shahazhajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahazhajnknĂŒmu|goshahazhajnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahazhajnĂŒmu|gokishahazhajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahazhajshĂ«nĂŒ|shahazhajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahazhajnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshahazhajnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahazhajshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishahazhajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahazhajshĂ«ro|shahazhajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahazhajnkshĂ«ro|goshahazhajnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahazhajshĂ«ro|gokishahazhajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahazhajshĂ«mu|shahazhajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahazhajnkshĂ«mu|goshahazhajnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahazhajshĂ«mu|gokishahazhajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahazhajronĂŒ|shahazhajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahazhajnkronĂŒ|goshahazhajnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahazhajronĂŒ|gokishahazhajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahazhajroshĂ«|shahazhajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahazhajnkroshĂ«|goshahazhajnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahazhajroshĂ«|gokishahazhajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahazhajromu|shahazhajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahazhajnkromu|goshahazhajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahazhajromu|gokishahazhajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahazhajmunĂŒ|shahazhajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahazhajnkmunĂŒ|goshahazhajnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahazhajmunĂŒ|gokishahazhajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahazhajmushĂ«|shahazhajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahazhajnkmushĂ«|goshahazhajnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahazhajmushĂ«|gokishahazhajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahazhajmuro|shahazhajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahazhajnkmuro|goshahazhajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahazhajmuro|gokishahazhajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
